summary: Rate Manager and Notifications Testing Complete. All 19 backend API tests pass. Rate Manager page loads correctly with grid, filters, date navigation. Edit dialog works for rate/availability/min_stay/stop_sell. Save updates DB and pushes to Exely successfully. NotificationBell component displays in header and opens dialog. Notifications API returns data correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility (React warning)

critical_code_review_comments: Exely SOAP push integration works with real test environment
All data-testid attributes present for testing
Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility
seed_data_creation: Rate calendar test data created during testing (room 5001574, rate plan 10003870, dates Feb 2026)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rate Manager page is at /rate-manager (not /app/rate-manager). API endpoints: GET /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/grid, POST /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/update (pushes to Exely), GET /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/room-types. Notification endpoints: GET /api/notifications/list, PUT /api/notifications/{id}/mark-read. NotificationBell is in Layout.js header. All features working correctly with real Exely test environment.

GET /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/gr.notes: Returns grid with room types, rate plans, dates, rate/availability/min_stay/stop_sell

POST /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/u.notes: Saves to DB and pushes to Exely. Returns saved count and push_results with success=true

GET /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/ro.notes: Returns room_types (3) and rate_plans (5) from Exely connection

PUT /api/notifications/{id}/mark-read.notes: Returns 404 for non-existent ID, would return success for valid ID

Page Load.notes: Page loads at /rate-manager with grid, filters, navigation buttons

Edit Dialog.notes: Click cell opens dialog with rate/availability/min_stay/stop_sell fields

Save Flow.notes: Save button saves and shows toast 'Fiyat güncellendi ve Exely'ye gönderildi'

Date Navigation.notes: Prev week, Today, Next week buttons work correctly

Filters.notes: Room type and rate plan filters present and functional

mocked_api_note: NO MOCKED APIs - All tests hit real Exely PMSConnect test endpoint and real MongoDB
